# `api/store.ts` — API Reference

## Overview

The `api/store.ts` module provides an in-memory store for managing todo items. In a real application this would be backed by a database. The module exports the `TodoStore` class and a pre-instantiated singleton `store` ready for use throughout the application.

---

## Exports

### `TodoStore` (class)

An in-memory store for todo items.

```ts
import { TodoStore } from './api/store';
```

#### Methods

---

##### `list()`

Return all todos, newest first.

**Parameters:** none

**Returns:** `Todo[]`

```ts
const todos = store.list();
```

---

##### `get(id)`

Find a single todo by id. Returns `undefined` if not found.

**Parameters:**

| Name | Type     | Description            |
|------|----------|------------------------|
| `id` | `string` | The id of the todo item |

**Returns:** `Todo | undefined`

```ts
const todo = store.get('abc-123');
if (todo) {
  console.log(todo.title);
}
```

---

##### `create(title)`

Create a new todo with the given title.

**Parameters:**

| Name    | Type     | Description                     |
|---------|----------|---------------------------------|
| `title` | `string` | The title for the new todo item |

**Returns:** `Todo`

```ts
const newTodo = store.create('Buy groceries');
```

---

##### `update(id, patch)`

Update an existing todo's title and/or completed state. Returns the updated todo, or `undefined` if not found.

**Parameters:**

| Name    | Type                                       | Description                          |
|---------|--------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------|
| `id`    | `string`                                   | The id of the todo item to update    |
| `patch` | `{ title?: string; completed?: boolean }`  | Fields to update on the todo item    |

**Returns:** `Todo | undefined`

```ts
const updated = store.update('abc-123', { completed: true });
if (updated) {
  console.log('Todo marked complete');
}
```

---

##### `delete(id)`

Delete a todo by id. Returns `true` if it existed, `false` otherwise.

**Parameters:**

| Name | Type     | Description                       |
|------|----------|-----------------------------------|
| `id` | `string` | The id of the todo item to delete |

**Returns:** `boolean`

```ts
const wasDeleted = store.delete('abc-123');
if (!wasDeleted) {
  console.warn('Todo not found');
}
```

---

### `store`

**Type:** `TodoStore`

A pre-instantiated singleton of `TodoStore` for use throughout the application.

```ts
import { store } from './api/store';

const all = store.list();
```
